creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #5)
The author, or someone else, still maintains the project's webpage. The license seems to be permissive[1]. It would be nice to convince the author to release his work, for example, on GitHub or somewhere else, so people can easily contribute to the project.

1. The ezjail license 
"THE BEER-WARE LICENSE" (Revision 42):
<erdgeist@erdgeist.org> and the ezjail-community are authors of these files.
As long as you retain this notice you can do whatever you want with this stuff.
If we meet some day, and you think this stuff is worth it, you can buy us a
beer in return. - Dirk Engling for the ezjail-community
